name: Brandied Tomato Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the tomatoes and reserve the liquid. Finely chop the tomatoes and set them aside.
2. In a 1-quart saucepan over medium heat, melt the butter or margarine.
Stir in the flour and cook for 1 minute.
3. Gradually stir in the beef broth, reserved tomato liquid, chopped tomatoes, brandy, meat-extract paste, and salt.
Cook, stirring until the gravy thickens and boils.
NOTE: Meat-extract paste is an extract of meat, concentrated to a paste, with seasoning added and packed in a jar. It is available in most supermarkets.
